home.description: Configure amounts, custom fields, and receipts—then share a public link, embed a clean checkout, or drop a QR code anywhere.
home.feature1d: Stripe handles cards; we never store PAN data.
home.feature2d: Hosted pages, iframe, and QR in one product.
home.feature3d: Logos, colors, and copy that match your org.
home.stack: Next.js, Supabase, Stripe (test mode), and Resend.

adminPages.title: Payment pages
adminPages.subtitle: Every page gets a public link, optional embed, and reports.
adminPages.empty: No pages yet. Create a payment page to get started.

adminReports.title: Reports
adminReports.subtitle: Default view: last 30 days. Filter by date, page, and status; export CSV matches the current table. Breakdowns use GL codes and Stripe payment method types.
adminReports.filtersDesc: Narrow by date, page, and status — then apply.
adminReports.filterHelp: Data below matches the last applied filters. Click Apply after changing dates or filters.
adminReports.noRows: No rows match your filters. Adjust filters and click Apply.
adminReports.askPlaceholder: e.g. How much did I earn in April 2026? Which page brought the most in March?
adminReports.askTypeMore: Type a question of at least a few words.
adminReports.askNoteAll: This answer is based on all {count} payment(s) loaded for this report.
adminReports.askNoteSample: This answer is based on the {sent} most recent payments out of {total} in your report (same data as the table below).
adminReports.askDbHint: for the Connection string (Postgres URI) — not the REST URL.

adminEdit.slugLine: Slug {slug} — inactive pages are hidden from the public but stay editable here.

pay.reviewLine: Review the amount and your details, then pay securely in one step.
pay.trustTitle: Why you can trust this page
pay.trustList1: Payments are processed securely by Stripe (test mode in demos).
pay.trustList2: Your card details are never stored on our servers.
pay.trustList3: You will receive a confirmation email after a successful payment.
pay.amountFixed: This amount is set by the organization and cannot be changed here.
pay.rangeHelp: Enter an amount within the allowed range.
pay.openHelp: Enter the amount you wish to pay.
pay.successBody: Thank you. If email confirmation is enabled for this page, check your inbox (and spam) for a receipt.
pay.successKeep: Keep this page or your email receipt for your records.
pay.returnHint: Same link you used to pay — for another payment or details.

stripe.title: Finish Stripe setup (test mode)
stripe.intro: Your publishable key isn’t in the app yet, so checkout can’t start.

errors.nameEmail: Enter your name and a valid email address.
errors.stripeKey: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to .env.local and restart npm run dev — see the yellow box above.
errors.networkSave: Network error while saving your payment.
errors.paymentProcessing: Payment is still processing. Refresh in a moment or check your email.
errors.fieldDropdown: “{label}” must be one of the allowed options.
errors.amountMustMatchFixed: Amount must match the fixed price for this page.

authSignup.title: Create account
authSignup.confirmMessage: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

distribution.envMissing: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL in your environment (e.g. https://your-app.vercel.app) to generate share links, iframe HTML, and QR codes.
distribution.title: Distribution
distribution.description: Share the hosted link, drop in an embed, or print a QR that opens checkout.
distribution.qrHelp: Scans open the same page as the public URL — works for print, posters, and desk signage.

newPage.title: New payment page
newPage.description: Configure branding, amounts, GL codes, custom fields, and confirmation email. After save you can copy links, iframe, and QR from Distribution.

metadata.defaultDescription: Configurable hosted payment pages for providers and payers.
